FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Mini Apps Center

0.q: What is the Mini Apps Center?
0.a: Mini Apps Center (Everything) is a super app that gathers multiple daily utilities like budget tracking, meal planners, simple games, and productivity dashboards under a single platform.

1.q: Is the platform free to use?
1.a: Yes! All core applications on our platform are completely free and free of advertisements.

2.a: Your identity is safely authenticated via Clerk, and your data is securely stored in a Supabase cloud database. Changing devices won't lose your data.

3.q: Can I add my own mini app?
3.a: Yes, our platform is highly modular. You can easily add a new frontend page and matching backend service following our developer rules.

4.a: Yes, our platform is built to compile as a native Android or iOS app using Capacitor. The responsive interface provides an app-like experience in any browser.

5.q: What does the friends feature do?
5.a: Adding friends allows you to share lists, view progress, and collaborate in multiplayer or cooperative mini apps.
